item.title: It's a quiet box office weekend as 'GOAT' edges 'Wuthering Heights'
item.description: Sony Pictures Animation’s film “GOAT” is leading a quiet weekend at the North American box office, beating “Wuthering Heights” in a second-weekend sho...

item.title: Why adults pursuing career growth or personal interests are the 'new majority' student
item.description: Millions of adults are continuing their education by returning to school and enrolling in credit and non-credit courses, certificates, micro-credentia...

item.title: NYC nursing walkout ends as last striking nurses approve new contract
item.description: Thousands of nurses at a major New York hospital system have approved a new contract, voting to end a strike after more than a month

item.title: Brazil and India agree to boost cooperation on rare earths
item.description: Brazil and India have signed a new deal to cooperate on rare earths and other critical minerals

item.title: Murky outlook for businesses after tariff ruling prompts countermoves by Trump
item.description: Businesses face a new wave of uncertainty after the Supreme Court struck down tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump under an emergency powers law ...
